title: Add first-party /docs (quickstart) page + route
description:
Add an on-site docs/quickstart page so the site's 'Docs' links stay first-party instead of bouncing to GitHub. Spec: docs/promo-website-orchestration-update-roadmap.md (Phase 3 / docs strategy).

Deliverables:
- New file cloud/worker/src/docs-page.ts exporting the page HTML (reuse sharedStyles/brand tokens; mirror landing.ts patterns).
- Wire route in cloud/worker/src/index.ts: serve it at '/docs' (this is the URL contract the landing-page nav points to). Follow the existing routing style in index.ts (e.g. the '/' and '/login' handlers).
- Content: install -> tk init -> create/track issues -> plan an epic -> orchestrate via the ticks skill (tk graph, parallel worktree agents, wave-by-wave) -> tk board. Cover BOTH pillars (tracker + orchestration). Link out to the GitHub README for depth. Use only real tk commands (no 'tk run').

FILE SAFETY: this tick touches docs-page.ts (new) + index.ts only — it must NOT edit landing.ts (the nav link is owned by the reposition tick). VERIFY: cd cloud/worker && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit, and curl/confirm /docs renders.
acceptance_criteria: GET /docs serves a Catppuccin-styled quickstart page covering tracker + orchestration; route wired in cloud/worker/src/index.ts; page reachable; cd cloud/worker && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit clean
closed_reason: Completed: added /docs first-party quickstart page (docs-page.ts) + GET /docs route in index.ts; covers tracker + orchestration, no tk run
